name: dlmm-agent
description: Autonomous DLMM LP agent for Meteora on Solana

scripts.test:hardening:core: node --test --test-force-exit action-journal.test.js agent-tools.test.js boot-recovery.test.js cycle-trace.test.js cycle-replay.test.js cycle-overlap.test.js degraded-mode.test.js dlmm-deploy-guard.test.js evidence-bundles.test.js executor-lifecycle-journal.test.js management-runtime.test.js negative-regime-memory.test.js operator-command-handlers.test.js operator-controls.test.js pool-memory.test.js portfolio-guards.test.js reconciliation.test.js regime-packs.test.js replay-review.test.js runtime-health.test.js runtime-policy.test.js startup-snapshot.test.js state.test.js test/test-runtime-fixes.js tools/screening.test.js tools/study.test.js
scripts.test:hardening:drills: node test/test-executor-boundary.js && node test/test-operator-drill.js && node test/test-chaos-drill.js
scripts.test:hardening: npm run test:hardening:core && npm run test:hardening:drills && npm run test:hardening:startup
